name: golang-github-azure-go-amqp-dev
title: golang-github-azure-go-amqp-dev
description:
aMQP 1.0 client library for Go (library)
The amqp module is an AMQP 1.0 client implementation for Go.
.
AMQP 1.0 is not compatible with AMQP 0-9-1 or 0-10.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-azure-go-amqp-dev because aMQP 1.0 client library for Go (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-azure-go-amqp-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-azure-go-amqp-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-azure-go-amqp-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
